chunks.text: The EECS Department is proud to present the 2024 Distinguished Alumni Awards in Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences. The Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences has established a Distinguished Alumni Award to recognize valuable contributions made by the distinguished alumni of Berkeley to the fields of Electrical Engineering and…
chunks.question: What is the purpose of the Distinguished Alumni Award?
chunks.answer: Recognize alumni contributions to EE and CS.
